trends.summary: More than 1,000 firefighters are battling two blazes in northern Japan, with some 3,000 people urged to leave their homes. The fires come as the country's winters become increasingly dry.

trends.headline: India news: Raghav Chadha, 6 other AAP MPs join BJP
trends.summary: The exit of seven Aam Aadmi Party MPs has dented the party's strength in the upper house of parliament, sparking fears of political instability. DW has more.

trends.headline: Germany news: Ships to head to Med for possible Hormuz role
trends.summary: German Defense Minister Pistorius has said German naval ships will deploy to the Mediterranean. Berlin has pledged support in the Strait of Hormuz, post-war. DW has more.

trends.headline: Iran's foreign minister leaves Pakistan, then Trump cancels U.S. delegation's travel
trends.summary: After arriving on Friday, Iran's Abbas Araghchi has left Islamabad, prompting President Trump to announce that his envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will no longer travel there Saturday for peace talks

trends.headline: CISA Adds 4 Exploited Flaws to KEV, Sets May 2026 Federal Deadline
trends.summary:
The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Friday added four vulnerabilities impacting SimpleHelp, Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server, and D-Link DIR-823X series routers to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing evidence of active exploitation.

trends.headline: This is who's developing Golden Dome's orbital interceptors—if they're ever built
trends.summary: "If boost-phase intercept from space is not affordable and scalable, we will not produce it."

trends.headline: Feds say Hawaii crime boss orchestrated his own death to shield millions in assets
trends.summary: A federal judge signaled he would allow some civil discovery to proceed in the government's bid to seize the late crime boss Michael Miske's $20 million fortune.

trends.headline: Judge grounds flyers’ attempt to undo Alaska-Hawaiian airlines merger
trends.summary: Alaska Airlines bought out Hawaiian Airlines in 2024, which a group of customers claimed had increased flight costs and reduced services in violation of antitrust laws.

trends.headline: Fifth Circuit unblocks Texas immigration law
trends.summary: The ruling is the latest in a long-running battle over a Texas law permitting state and local law enforcement to arrest people for immigration violations and empowering state judges to issue deportation orders.

trends.headline: Feds yet to return vehicle Renee Good was shot and killed in
trends.summary: The Honda Pilot reportedly remains shrink-wrapped and unexamined in an FBI storage facility.

trends.headline: Solderless RGB LED Clips guide
trends.summary: Hook up RGB LED strip easily and without soldering! These clips make it super simple to affix two strips together, either with an extension or a coupler, and third option allows easy connection to a power supply and controller. Check out the simple guide and buy solderless clips!

trends.headline: Civil trial opens for socialite that killed two young brothers in hit-and-run
trends.summary: Rebecca Grossman is serving 15 years to life in prison for hitting and killing Mark and Jacob Iskander with her car. Now she's standing as a defendant in the civil trial.
